non_blocking_issues: Appearance font/display-size slider thumb is a thin vertical line; a larger circular thumb would improve touch ergonomics. Cosmetic only.
Storage Cache Management 'Clear lost sessions' disabled state (no server connection) is correct but could surface why more prominently if multiple server groups exist. Minor.
notes: Runtime visual validation on emulator-5554 (Debug build). Screenshots: home/nav, Settings slim list, Storage (Clear Data → Cache Management), Appearance language selector, Storage after Block-2 fix (Reset local data + Message cache label), reset confirmation dialog. All five icon-only bottom-nav tabs render and switch without crash; insets clean, no clipping/overlap. Settings landing is slim (no back/dividers/subtitles, 5 entries). Q8 Storage order Clear Data then Cache Management verified; Clear Data is flat/non-tinted with metric + Reset local data on one row. Reset dialog enumerates all 10 destructive-scope items + irreversibility in EN (title 'Clear all local data?'). Appearance language segmented control (System/中文/English) renders. Block-1/Block-2 fixes confirmed visually. Limitations: service-backed flows (server connect, live orphan sweep, actual cache clear, locale live-switch effect) unverifiable due to localhost-reconnecting state — deferred to post-release runtime testing with credentials.
